title: TF2 Pan for Farmer's Delight
description: This is a resource pack that replaces the Skillet's attack sounds to TF2 noises
body:
This resource pack just replaces the strong attack and weak attack for the skillet with the Critical hit and Frying Pan sound. This resource pack was only made for my entertainment if you enjoy this then thank you. 
![Seadrive Look Out!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f37a3ae5887d6384134de726330e575cea17af1.png)
